---
#title: "Open Handbook Commons"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: /images/logo.png
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    css: /css/homepage.css
---

```{=html}
<hr>
<p class="tagline">Open Practical Knowledge for Everyone</p>
<hr>
```

:::{.social}
[{{< fa envelope >}}](mailto:contact@openhandbook.org) | 
[[matrix]](https://matrix.to/#/#open-handbook:matrix.org) | 
[{{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/openhandbookcommons) 
:::


**Under Active Development**
